title: Spirit of Lordship
description: Colors of the Soul series - Gold energy of leadership: Awaken the spirit of a Lord or Lady within as you venture into a realm of kingdoms and peril above and below. Shall you and your country stand strong before the test of time?
body:
# *Fulfill your destiny*
![SoL Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kugeIKuZ/images/a2c83e840f718a50407c15867e3fe9b0f910a643.png)

Enter a world of kingdoms and dungeons as you travel the road of fortune and glory. Fulfill your destiny as a to-be king or queen of a new grand realm founded on your honor thanks to SamB440's Tale of Kingdoms: A new Conquest - the restoration project of the legendary Tale of Kingdoms mod!

Take on towers filled with peril and treasure, or accept quests held by taverns dotted across the lands, where worthy adventurers gather for the challenge, the rewards and sometimes the respite, or set out to find the means to continue your unearthing of the lost and forgotten secrets of the mana in the mysterious plant life rooted in the soils of the world. Combat the darkness lurking and plotting in the shadows of the world as you set out to change the course of history!

## **The Guild awaits - Your crown, throne and people await**
![Step into greatness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kugeIKuZ/images/8a9fe54d4d3ad522c3d0c7ad4d17b27255eaea2f.png)
<details>

#### ***Other source links:***

- [Castle Dungeons from Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/castle-dungeons)

- [Craftable Horse Armour & Saddle from Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cha-s)

---

## ***Member of the Colors of the Soul series, in the gold energy of leadership***
